name: carbon-context-mcp
description: Unofficial local MCP server for the IBM Carbon Design System (not affiliated with IBM). Offline docs/token/component lookup over a bundled reference pack. No network or token required.

tools.name: carbon_docs_search
tools.description: Full-text search across the bundled Carbon reference pack.

tools.name: carbon_component
tools.description: @carbon/react component API, variants, rules, and example.

tools.name: carbon_code_search
tools.description: Hybrid (semantic + keyword) search over the bundled code corpus: Storybook snippets, @carbon/react imports, Sass/reference fences, chart examples, and curated examples.

tools.name: carbon_chart
tools.description: @carbon/charts data-viz: look up a chart by name or recommend by intent; returns component, data shape, options, and a runnable React example.

tools.name: carbon_ai_chat
tools.description: @carbon/ai-chat: build a Carbon AI chat UI. Topic/response-type lookup + setup, PublicConfig, messaging/streaming wiring, theming, and Next.js notes.

tools.name: carbon_labs
tools.description: @carbon-labs/* experimental incubation packages: look up by name or by a gap core Carbon lacks (with react/web-component filter); overview covers 0.x stability caveats and the @carbon/ai-chat vs @carbon-labs/ai-chat disambiguation.

tools.name: carbon_guidelines
tools.description: Carbon guidance + 'fake Carbon' anti-patterns for a topic.
